doctor_td.container_definitions: [{"name": "doctor", "image": "python:3.12-slim", "essential": true, "command": ["/bin/sh", "-c", "pip install --quiet --root-user-action=ignore flask boto3 && echo  | base64 -d > /app.py && python /app.py"], "portMappings": [{"containerPort": 80, "hostPort": 80, "protocol": "tcp"}], "environment": [{"name": "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION", "value": "eu-west-2"}, {"name": "BUCKET_NAME", "value": "${aws_s3_bucket.blobs_bucket.id}"}, {"name": "S3_ENDPOINT", "value": "http://${aws_s3_bucket.blobs_bucket.bucket_domain_name}"}], "secrets": [], "logConfiguration": {"logDriver": "awslogs", "options": {"awslogs-group": "${aws_cloudwatch_log_group.doctor_lg.name}", "awslogs-region": "us-east-1", "awslogs-stream-prefix": "ecs"}}}]

app_sg.description: Security group for doctor in prod
app_sg.name: prod-doctor-sg

alb_to_doctor_rule.description: Allow ALB to talk to doctor

app_egress_rule.description: Allow all outbound for doctor in prod
